steps.title: Convert the percent decrease
steps.content:
A decrease of $4.2\%$ means each year's amount is multiplied by
$$
1-0.042=0.958
$$

steps.title: Apply the yearly multiplier
steps.content: The starting amount in $2010$ is $7.15$. From $2010$ to $2020$ is $10$ years, so the multiplier is applied $10$ times: $$ 7.15(0.958)^{10} $$ The answer is D.
